rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MANUEL CRUZ MARTIR
rulings.Calendar Matter: Demurrer To Petition Of Administrator Manuel Martir, Jr. To Determine Ownership Of Estate Property And For Order Authorizing And Directing The Transfer Of Estate Property To Claimant Manuel Martir, Jr., Individually
rulings.Rulings: The Demurrer to Petition of Administrator Manuel Martir, Jr. to Determine Ownership of Estate Property, etc. is taken off calendar as moot, in light of the First Amended Petition having been filed on August 15, 2019.
